caption: Transform your living space with this stunning area rug! The perfect blend of comfort and style for any room. Love how it ties the whole space together!
Area rugs are the secret to defining spaces in open floor plans. This geometric pattern adds so much character! What's your favorite rug style?

Wrapped in these beautiful flatweave rugs, tradition meets modern storytelling. Each piece is handmade with natural fibers and vegetable dyes, carrying earthy tones and tribal patterns that honor Iranian heritage. A woven reminder of warmth, craft, and culture. Tribal/Kilim-style flatweave in mustard, ochre, terracotta, olive green, navy, cream.

These gradient rugs play with light, texture, and color in the most beautiful way. Hand-tufted with a blend of New Zealand wool and bamboo silk, they shift from deep tones to soft neutrals through a broken grid pattern that feels modern and artistic. A stunning example of how materials can glow when light moves across them.

This layered neutral rug brings softness and structure into the room. With its textured weave, subtle tone shifts, and fringed edges, it creates a calm, grounded foundation for modern interiors. A beautiful example of how simple materials and thoughtful construction can elevate a space. Textured/layered border rug in warm beige and cream tones.

This cream-toned rug brings a sculptural feel to the room with its raised, maze-like pattern. The subtle high-low texture adds depth while keeping the design clean and modern, making it a perfect fit for minimalist or contemporary interiors. Modern high-low textured rug with carved geometric lines.

This colorful, pattern-rich rug brings personality and warmth into the room. With its geometric motifs, playful dots, and earthy palette, it adds a lively layer to the space while still feeling grounded and artisan-made. A perfect match for eclectic, boho, or globally inspired interiors. Bohemian/global-inspired geometric rug in cream with navy, teal, green, terracotta, mustard accents.

This sunlit room feels even warmer with a rug that mirrors nature in its soft, organic shapes. The round design, paired with earthy beige and sand tones, adds a calm, sculptural presence that ties the entire open space together. A beautiful fit for modern, desert-inspired, or biophilic interiors. Modern organic round abstract rug in light beige with tan and warm sand accents.
Patio season is here! This weather-resistant outdoor rug completely transformed our deck space. Perfect for entertaining!
Don't sleep on outdoor rugs! They're the easiest way to make your patio feel like an extension of your home. This coastal pattern is giving all the vacation vibes.

A rug that moves with the wind and lives under the sun. These woven outdoor rugs bring texture, warmth, and effortless style to open-air spaces—perfect for patios, terraces, and modern desert-inspired homes. Durable, breathable, and beautifully natural. Flatweave outdoor rug in sand, beige, natural straw tones.

A rug that brings warmth to the outdoors naturally. This woven piece grounds the patio with earthy texture and effortless style—perfect for breezy mornings, open-door living, and gatherings that spill from inside to out. Durable, timeless, and made for sun-filled spaces. Natural-look braided outdoor rug in honey brown, tan, warm beige.

A soothing blend of texture and movement—this outdoor rug brings the calm rhythm of water into any open-air space. Soft waves of blue and taupe create a peaceful foundation for lounging, reading, or slow mornings with sunlight pouring in. Contemporary abstract water-inspired outdoor rug in blue, navy, taupe, soft beige.

An outdoor rug that blends sustainability with serene design. Handloom-knotted from recycled PET fibers, this piece brings soft texture, subtle stripes, and lasting durability to terraces and poolside spaces. 100% recycled PET indoor-outdoor performance flatweave in neutral beige, taupe, grey stripe variations.

A peaceful outdoor retreat starts from the ground up. This crisp, patterned outdoor rug brings softness, structure, and warmth to open-air spaces while seamlessly blending with natural light and earthy tones. Designed for durability and everyday elegance. Performance flatweave in cream base with warm tan/brown accents.

Outdoor rugs! Discover the Venice Outdoor Recycled Plastic Rug in Golden Green, Deep Forest Green, and White. Eco-friendly, stylish, and durable, it's perfect for enhancing any outdoor space. Elevate your patio decor effortlessly! Reversible, weather-resistant recycled materials.

Summer's Here — Time to Refresh Your Outdoor Space! Say hello to our brand NEW collection of outdoor rugs — designed to bring vibrant color, bold patterns, and cozy comfort to your patio, deck, or garden. Instant style upgrade, durable and weather-resistant, comfort underfoot.
Finally found the perfect runner for our entryway! It adds warmth and protects our hardwood floors. Win-win!
This vintage-inspired runner adds so much character to our narrow hallway. Love how it creates a visual pathway through the home.

A sleek runner that brings texture, warmth, and intention to long walkways. Perfect for contemporary homes, this hallway piece softens polished floors while guiding the eye through the space with quiet elegance. Modern minimalist runner in charcoal, grey, soft white linear accents. Low pile for high-traffic areas.

A hallway runner that turns a simple passage into pure personality. Bold patterns, playful shapes, and vibrant colors come together to create a piece that feels like art underfoot — unexpected, joyful, and unforgettable. Artistic maximalist runner in red, coral, blue, mustard, beige, brown. Hand-tufted with carved detailing.

Stepping into the season with a hallway that feels fresh, bright and beautifully put together. A runner instantly adds warmth, texture and flow to long, narrow spaces, making every step feel intentional. Checkered design with personality while keeping the space clean, bright and cohesive.

Long hallways deserve a moment of joy, and this colourful runner brings it effortlessly. Soft stripes in playful hues brighten the space, add movement, and turn a simple passageway into a cheerful, inviting transition. Multi-coloured stripes, lightweight flatweave.

A hallway runner that knows how to make an entrance. The rich stripes and warm tones bring depth, colour, and character to an otherwise quiet corridor, turning a simple walkway into a beautifully grounded moment in the home. Bold multicolour stripes, dense woven texture, strong border detailing.

How stunning is this hallway runner. A hand drawn sketch of tribal inspired line work in a mix of loop and cut pile exploring texture and contrast for this timeless piece. Designed by the talented team @ysg.studio. Bespoke hallway runner with understated luxury and handcrafted details.

Elegance in every step. China Hand Knotted Wool Rug 305x104cm — Hallway Runner. The rich detailing and classic design bring timeless elegance to any corridor. Hand-knotted wool with vintage-style motifs.
Nothing beats stepping onto a plush shag rug first thing in the morning! This ultra-soft piece makes our bedroom feel like a luxury retreat.
Who says shag rugs are outdated? This modern take adds texture and warmth without the retro look. Perfect for our minimalist living room!

Wrapped in softness and warmth, this faux fur rug adds a cozy, plush touch to any room. With its long, fluffy pile and cloud-like texture, it's perfect for layering beside the bed, by the fireplace, or in a relaxing reading nook. Ultra-soft faux fur shag in light grey.

A shag rug that instantly lifts the entire room. With its plush texture and playful blocks of colour, this piece brings warmth, softness and a touch of modern whimsy to the space. It anchors the seating area beautifully while adding a cosy layer that makes the whole living room feel more inviting. Modern playful colour-block design.

A shag rug that instantly warms up the room. The plush, high-pile texture brings softness to this mid-century modern space, balancing the clean lines and bold shapes with a layer of cozy comfort. It anchors the seating area beautifully, adds visual depth, and creates that irresistible sink-in feeling every living room deserves.

A calm, cozy bedroom made even softer with a Moroccan-inspired shag rug that sets the tone for slow mornings. The high-pile texture adds warmth, comfort, and a grounded feel to the all-white space. It's the kind of rug that makes getting out of bed a little easier because your feet land on something plush and cloud-soft. Gentle diamond pattern in neutral tones.

A warm, sunlit bedroom made softer with a plush shag rug that wraps the space in comfort. The high-pile texture adds a cozy layer underfoot and balances the rich wood tones, creating a relaxed retreat that still feels elevated. Light neutral tones that complement warm wood palettes.

A bold shag rug that instantly becomes the soul of the room. The rich gradient—from warm oranges to deep plum—adds depth, drama, and a cozy softness that plays beautifully against the vintage furniture and textured walls. This is how you make a room feel lived-in, layered, and full of personality. Rich color gradient with plush high-pile texture.
